title: Better Terracotta
body:
# Better Terracotta


''As the name suggests this Resourcepack makes Terracotta look more Consistent or Accurate to its description, As many might know Some Terracotta Blocks Don't Really Look like their Name Suggests they do, like White Terracotta or Cyan Terracotta. This aims to fix this aswell as changing some of the Glazed Terracotta Variants to make them resemble more of their original colour.''

## Questions
''Can I use this in a Modpack?'' With Credit! 

''Can you add ____?'' Maybe, if I like the idea.

''Will you update for 1.21.6?'' Yup! and even further!

## Others


If it says anything about being wrong version, its lying to you <3
